message:
feat(wasm-import): implement Phase 2 - host functions for WASM imports

Add WASM import support to enable JS code to load and call user WASM modules:

Phase 2 Implementation:
- Added __edgebox_wasm_import() host function to load WASM modules by path
- Added __edgebox_wasm_call() host function to invoke WASM functions
- Registered both functions in WAMR native symbol table
- Initialize/deinitialize WASM module registry in main()

Technical Details:
- Fix: Export wasm_import_loader.c namespace as pub for cross-module type compatibility
- Fix: Use @constCast() for WAMR API that expects mutable args pointer
- Fix: Use @ptrCast() to convert between different @cImport namespaces
- Fix: Call wasm_runtime_get_export_type() with module (not instance)
- Fix: Use WASM_IMPORT_EXPORT_KIND_FUNC constant for export kind check

Status:
✅ Phase 2.1-2.4: Host functions complete
⏭️ Next: Phase 3 - QuickJS import hook + test WASM module

Related: #wasm-imports, WASM_IMPORTS_DESIGN.md
